description_long: This object is a classic lever-action shotgun featuring a long, cylindrical barrel with a dark metallic finish and a wooden stock. The stock is full-sized, made from a medium-brown wood with visible grain, and extends into a robust receiver area. The barrel is reinforced with two barrel bands and has a front sight post, while the receiver is slightly bulkier and finished in a matte black. The lever loop is prominent beneath the receiver, indicating the action mechanism, and the trigger guard is rounded and integrated with the lever. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible embellishments, making it suitable for practical use in urban or rural environments.
description: A lever-action shotgun with a long, dark metal barrel and a full wooden stock, featuring a prominent lever loop and rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, long barrel, and lever-action mechanism.
description_view_1: Front-on view displaying the narrow profile of the barrel and the alignment of the stock, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the full wooden stock, barrel, and lever-action mechanism from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear-on view focusing on the end of the stock and the back of the receiver, with the barrel appearing as a thin line.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long cylindrical barrel with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard integrated with the lever, no finger grooves or reinforcement visible
